name: Yosenjus' Sword Sting
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>居</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>太</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>た</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control no monsters: Reveal up to 2 "Yosenju" monsters with different names in your hand, then target the same number of face-up cards your opponent controls; return them to the hand. You can only activate 1 "Yosenjus' Sword Sting" per turn.
eff: If you control no monsters: Reveal up to 2 "Yosenju" monsters with different names in your hand, then target the same number of face-up cards your opponent controls; return them to the hand. You can only activate 1 "Yosenjus' Sword Sting" per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
